item.title: F-025c: AI Summarize
item.intent: One-tap summarization — select a section or full document and get a concise summary you can insert or copy
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-041 (AI Model Pipeline), FEAT-054 (AI Action Bar). Select text or full document, tap Summarize. AI generates 1-3 sentence summary (for section) or 1 paragraph (for full doc). Summary appears in a popover. User can: Insert at cursor, Copy to clipboard, or Dismiss. Works offline on supported devices. First token <500ms, full response <3s.
acceptanceCriteria: Selected section produces 1-3 sentence summary in a popover within 3 seconds
User can insert summary at cursor position
User can copy summary to clipboard
Works offline on iPhone 15 and newer
